examples: He was wearing shorts which showed his long, muscular, hairy legs.
Men still appear to be labouring under the misapprehension that women want hairy, muscular men.
He stuck his nose out of the doghouse and saw four slender, hairy animals.
When the bug was on a hairy patch it was detected, on average, every four seconds.
But what I wanted was horses: small hairy ones, glossy dancing ones, mud, sweat and leather.
